title: Moving items between boards via automation

posts.author: CRitter (Cameron Ritter)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello everyone,

I am running into an issue of having statuses align across all boards in my work environment. The status options (words) are the same across 4 boards, but the color that correlates with each option doesn’t match. The issue is that when creating an item (project) on another board via automation, or moving an item (project) from one board to another, the status that shows on the new board will match the color of the original status chosen, not the option (word) selected.

Based on this, is there an easy way to ensure that statuses used across multiple boards can match, ie duplicating and moving between boards? Or do I need to manually create each status and match the color to be the same on each board?

Let me know if I am not being clear. Thanks!

posts.author: patrick7 (Patrick Kool)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Cameron,

You can type the status name in most automations (see screenshot). If you do that, you’re usre it will use the right status in the other board.
